name: Shad in Mustard Crumbs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Shad Filets, skinless and boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush shad filets with 3 tablespoons of the mustard.
2. Dredge in bread crumbs.
3. Dab remaining 3 tablespoons of mustard over the breadings.
4. Dredge again in the bread crumbs. It's okay if the surface looks crumbly.
5. Saute fish in olive oil until it flakes easily, about 4 minutes per side.
6. Serve with lemon wedges.
Per Serving: Calories: 515, Protein: 33 g, Carbohydrate: 24 g, Fat: 29 g, Saturated Fat: 8 g, Cholesterol: 150 mg, Sodium: 910 mg.
